narrative:
Williamsburg Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 937 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.1 percentage points.
